overall.description: Cinematic game footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a high-angle aerial view of a futuristic cityscape transitioning from blue hour to golden hour sunrise. The camera slowly pans right across towering brutalist skyscrapers and neon-lit buildings as flying vehicles traverse the sky and the sun rises between the towers, casting dramatic light across the urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city rooftop overlook during blue hour

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead from left to right across the cityscape

agents.ego_description: stationary aerial observation point slowly panning right across the dawn cityscape

notable_agents.action: flying car traversing the sky from left to right above the highway

entered.detail: massive central tower with blocky concrete architecture and red signage near the top
large glowing red and blue holographic advertisement attached to the building facade
rusted metal scaffolding and pipework on the left side buildings
tall dark building with vertical white light strips running down its facade
multi-level highway interchange visible below with moving traffic lights

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a dark futuristic cityscape during blue hour, with the camera positioned high above an elevated highway. A massive brutalist tower dominates the center while neon holographic signs glow on the left building. A flying vehicle passes overhead from left to right, and the distant mountains are barely visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: city center transition zone at dawn

events.description: sunlight begins hitting the upper edges of the central tower buildings as dawn breaks

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan right, capturing the changing light on the city architecture

entered.detail: hazy mountain silhouette becoming visible on the right horizon as the sky brightens

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning right, the sky transitions from deep blue to lighter dawn colors. The brutalist tower moves to the left side of frame while the glass skyscraper becomes more prominent on the right. The first rays of sunlight begin illuminating the building tops, and distant mountains emerge from the haze on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit urban canyon during golden hour

events.description: sun disk becomes fully visible between the towers creating intense lens flare and golden illumination
multiple flying vehicles appear in the distance moving across the bright sky

agents.ego_description: completing the panoramic sweep as the sun rises fully, creating a cinematic golden hour view

notable_agents.action: flying vehicles moving across the sky silhouetted against the bright sunrise

entered.detail: intense sun visible between the skyscrapers casting golden light and lens flares across the scene

segments.scene_description: The final segment captures full golden hour as the sun disk emerges between the towers, bathing the city in warm light. The brutalist tower exits the frame left while flying vehicles traverse the bright sky. The glass skyscraper remains prominent on the right, and the elevated highway below reflects the morning light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-angle pan across a futuristic cityscape that transforms from the cool tones of blue hour into a radiant golden sunrise. It begins high above an elevated highway, where a massive brutalist tower dominates the center and neon holographic signs glow against a deep blue sky. As the camera pans right, the lighting shifts toward the colors of dawn, causing the brutalist tower to slide left while a glass skyscraper emerges and the distant mountains become visible through the lifting haze. The scene then opens into full golden hour as the sun disk rises between the towers, bathing the urban landscape in warm light. Finally, the camera captures flying vehicles traversing the bright sky while the elevated highway below reflects the brilliant morning glow.
